Gavriil Sokolov is a proud resident of Heroncrest Place, although he was born in the tranquil Candlebark Vale. He acquired his educational background at Lakespire Academy and has since developed a successful career at Cinder Sparrow Chocolates. In his role, Gavriil specializes in working with Wolof syllables, which play a significant part in the creative process of chocolate creation. His background and experiences have inspired his contributions within the company. Gavriil embodies a unique blend of artistry and linguistic skill that enriches the flavors of fine chocolates.
